task: Separate Gemini free-tier usage from paid AI cost accounting

governance_bootstrap.summary: Completion requires real evidence and residual risk reporting for operations changes.
Code changes require completion evidence, verification, and deployment source-of-truth discipline.

problem: Gemini free-tier calls were recorded in api_cost_log with the same provider/source as paid Google calls, so the dashboard cost card and paid cost gate treated free-tier EDU refinement as paid usage.
fix: Free-tier EDU runs now set API_COST_SOURCE=gemini-free-tier. Cost log inserts persist the source column, paid cost gates exclude gemini-free-tier, and dashboard cost queries exclude gemini-free-tier from paid cost totals.

verification.name: cost source diagnosis
verification.command: aggregate api_cost_log by day/model/source and inspect tier3-filter/edu-tier3-free logs
verification.result: paid com.harness.tier3-filter consumed the daily budget before the cost gate, while later free-tier EDU calls were also counted in api_cost_log as paid-looking google pipeline usage

verification.name: macmini deploy
verification.result: pass: deployment source-of-truth check and Mac Mini target diff check passed; backend restarted on port 8000

verification.name: macmini free-tier cost backfill
verification.command: update today's Gemini rows created after 2026-07-05 09:17:00 to source=gemini-free-tier, then recompute paid cost excluding that source
verification.result: pass: 55 Google Gemini calls were tagged gemini-free-tier; paid-cost estimate excluding free-tier became $2.0081 while free-tier usage was 64,623 input tokens and 49,852 output tokens

remaining_verification: Future --free-tier EDU runs should write source=gemini-free-tier automatically. If the dashboard cost card rises unexpectedly again, compare api_cost_log source breakdown before assuming real billing.
